caption: A split-screen video presentation features a woman on the left and a man on the right. The woman has red hair and wears red earrings and a blue patterned shirt. The man has a bald head, a white goatee, and wears black-rimmed glasses and a blue button-down shirt. He is positioned in a room with a framed picture on the wall and a neon "OPEN" sign visible in the background. Both individuals appear to be speaking, with their mouths moving slightly across the sequence. Below them, blue banners display text: "FOCUS with Margaret Harrington" on the left and "No More Time Climate Crisis Poems by Greg Delanty" on the right, accompanied by a "TOWN MEETING TV" logo. The scene remains static in terms of composition and location, with only subtle changes in the facial expressions and lip movements of the two participants.
